mapper.select: SELECT rr.*, u.id as u_id, u.username as u_username, u.nickname as u_nickname, u.avatar_url as u_avatar, tu.id as tu_id, tu.username as tu_username, tu.nickname as tu_nickname, tu.avatar_url as tu_avatar FROM review_reply rr LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON rr.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_user tu ON rr.to_user_id = tu.id WHERE rr.review_id = #{reviewId} AND rr.status = #{status} AND rr.parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY rr.create_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT rr.*, u.id as u_id, u.username as u_username, u.nickname as u_nickname, u.avatar_url as u_avatar, tu.id as tu_id, tu.username as tu_username, tu.nickname as tu_nickname, tu.avatar_url as tu_avatar FROM review_reply rr LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON rr.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_user tu ON rr.to_user_id = tu.id WHERE rr.review_id = #{reviewId} AND rr.parent_id = #{parentId} AND rr.status = #{status} ORDER BY rr.create_time ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO review_reply (review_id, user_id, parent_id, to_user_id, content, status) VALUES
(#{item.reviewId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.parentId}, #{item.toUserId}, #{item.content}, #{item.status})
